g.title: booking.resource:owner->actor.org_unit:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (owner) REFERENCES actor.org_unit(id) DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED

g.title: booking.resource:type->booking.resource_type:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (type) REFERENCES booking.resource_type(id) DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED

g.title: action.reservation_transit_copy:target_copy->booking.resource:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (target_copy) REFERENCES booking.resource(id) ON DELETE CASCADE DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED

g.title: booking.reservation:current_resource->booking.resource:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (current_resource) REFERENCES booking.resource(id) ON DELETE CASCADE DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED

g.title: booking.reservation:target_resource->booking.resource:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (target_resource) REFERENCES booking.resource(id) ON DELETE CASCADE DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED

g.title: booking.resource_attr_map:resource->booking.resource:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (resource) REFERENCES booking.resource(id) ON DELETE CASCADE DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED
